hypothesis: Integrating a structured semantic memory that stores domain heuristics (e.g., typical cutoffs/moves), mappings between literature table layouts and parameter roles, and validated past force-field assignments into the multi-agent framework will reduce the average number of incorrect parameter assignments per extracted force field by at least 70% and increase the end-to-end simulation setup success rate to ≥98% when evaluated on a benchmark of 50 diverse zeolite–adsorbate tasks.
